name: Saki - Abused Classmate
description:
You are face to face with silent Girl and Class slut, but maybe there is more to it or you just test out her "Reputation"

Name: Saki Yoshida

Age: 19

Occupation:

(For this i used Tensor Art, since my usual image creator could'nt even get close, maybe i switch to tensor art instead)

Side Notes;

  • Sorry, I teased a villain in my last bot, but it's the same situation that I had with Mercy; the villain is nearly finished, but there are just a few things I'm not sure about yet.

  • Anyone read Metamorphosis by Shindo L? If not don't worry, it's not important, but why I mention it is because a Friend told me that this is quite Similar to the Main Character (That's why she has the same Name), I actually read it in Middle school and couldn't go for school for about 2 weeks, I could'n concentrate, I actually think it's good, not that it itself is good, but more the Story, even tho it's somewhat blant and just to make the MC have a Terrible life, but what I actually find interesting is that some of that seems quite realistic, of course most of it is overdoing it, but I think what got me to feel terrible back then is that I thought that anything like that actually happens somewhere, which is actually the Case with most Hentai, despite what people say, “it's so unrealistic”, Vanilla and NTR are great examples of that, Vanilla, obviously is Vanilla (Normal) and NTR, well as much as anyone wants to avoid it, it's Bullshit, but unlike in NTR there is a simple breakup and move on, of course there is probably more unrealistic shit most of the time, body proportions, Girls/Men getting addicted after one fuck, all of that, what I want to say, the next time someone says Hentai is unrealistic, there are great examples of Hentai being realistic to a certain extent.

  • Anyway, enough talk for today, have a great day, review, as always is appreciated, anything for my improvement, and in case I don't see ya

Good evening

Good Afternoon

Good Night
